scope: Compose services that mount the host Docker socket or declare an explicit root user

gap_019_b2_summary.reason: A generic Docker socket proxy still exposes broad container create, exec, network, volume, and image authority to trusted-host services. ArcLink needs command-specific brokers with deployment-scoped validation before direct writeable socket mounts can be removed.
gap_019_b2_summary.remaining_gate: GAP-019 remains open until the operator either lands dedicated brokers for the writeable services or accepts the direct-socket trusted-host residual risk with monitoring and incident controls.

gap_019_c_summary.control_type: public Agent bridge command allowlist plus deployment-root path confinement
gap_019_c_summary.reason: Detached public Agent bridge jobs are durable state. The bridge worker now treats the stored command as untrusted data and rejects anything except the generated hermes-gateway bridge exec forms.
gap_019_c_summary.remaining_gate: This narrows one public-bot delivery escape path and is preserved by the GAP-019-F broker split; GAP-019 remains open for the broker's direct Docker socket authority.

gap_019_d_summary.control_type: removed Docker socket mount and socket group from the Curator refresh loop
gap_019_d_summary.reason: The Curator refresh command refreshes vault, Notion index, fanout, upgrade notifications, and pin-upgrade detection. Source evidence routes queued Docker-mode operator upgrade execution through the enrollment provisioner path, so curator-refresh no longer needs host Docker API authority.
gap_019_d_summary.remaining_gate: This removes one writeable socket service from the Docker stack but does not close GAP-019 for the deployment and gateway brokers, control-action-worker root migration capture, agent-supervisor, or operator residual-risk decisions.

gap_019_e_summary.control_type: executor deployment-root, project-name, env-file, and compose-file preflight before Docker runner dispatch
gap_019_e_summary.reason: The local executor now treats deployment-scoped Compose paths and project names as untrusted request data and rejects malformed deployment ids, non-matching apply project names, and paths outside the configured ARCLINK_STATE_ROOT_BASE deployment config root before invoking Docker.
gap_019_e_summary.remaining_gate: This narrows the control-provisioner local executor command path but does not remove its writeable Docker socket mount or close GAP-019.

gap_019_f_summary.control_type: dedicated gateway exec broker for Raven-mediated public-Agent Hermes gateway turns
gap_019_f_summary.reason: notification-delivery no longer mounts the host Docker socket; it sends a bounded deployment_id, prefix, project_name, payload, and timeout request to a dedicated broker that reconstructs and validates the hermes-gateway Docker exec command locally.
gap_019_f_summary.remaining_gate: This moves public-Agent bridge Docker authority out of notification-delivery but does not make the broker tenant-safe; GAP-019 remains open until every writeable socket service is brokered or the operator accepts the residual risk.

gap_019_g_summary.control_type: dedicated deployment exec broker for local Docker Compose apply, inspect, and teardown operations
gap_019_g_summary.reason: control-provisioner no longer mounts the host Docker socket in Docker mode; the local executor sends deployment_id, generated project name, operation kind, and deployment config paths to a broker that rejects raw commands and reconstructs the allowlisted Docker Compose operation locally.
gap_019_g_summary.remaining_gate: This moves local provisioning Docker authority out of control-provisioner but does not make the deployment-exec-broker tenant-safe; GAP-019 remains open for the broker, control-action-worker root migration capture, agent-supervisor, gateway-exec-broker, and operator residual-risk decision.

gap_019_h_summary.control_type: removed Docker socket mount and socket group from the root action worker by delegating local Docker Compose lifecycle/apply operations to deployment-exec-broker
gap_019_h_summary.reason: The action worker still needs root to stage Pod migration captures from root-owned bind mounts, but local Docker lifecycle and reprovision Compose calls can use the existing deployment exec broker instead of a direct socket mount.
gap_019_h_summary.remaining_gate: This removes one root+socket service from the Docker stack, but GAP-019 remains open for the action worker root migration-capture boundary, agent-supervisor authority, broker socket residual risk, and an operator residual-risk decision.

gap_019_i_summary.control_type: dedicated agent supervisor broker for dashboard network and dashboard proxy sidecar operations
gap_019_i_summary.reason: agent-supervisor no longer mounts the Docker socket. Dashboard network creation, supervisor network attachment, dashboard proxy sidecar start, and proxy sidecar removal go through a tokened broker that rejects raw commands and validates agent ids, ports, network names, container names, and private-state paths.
gap_019_i_summary.remaining_gate: This removes direct Docker socket authority from agent-supervisor. GAP-019 remains open for the agent-supervisor-broker direct Docker socket risk, deployment and gateway broker socket residual risk, root helper residual risk, and operator residual-risk decisions.

gap_019_j_summary.control_type: queued Docker-mode operator upgrade broker controls
gap_019_j_summary.reason: After agent-supervisor lost direct Docker socket access, queued operator upgrades still needed a source-owned path. The enrollment provisioner now delegates Docker-mode host upgrades and pinned-component upgrade apply/final-upgrade calls to the tokened operator-upgrade-broker, which reconstructs only allowlisted upgrade commands and validates the private operator-action log path.
gap_019_j_summary.remaining_gate: This keeps the root supervisor from running raw Docker upgrade commands, but operator-upgrade-broker still has host-root-equivalent Docker socket authority and mounts the live host repo path for the allowlisted upgrade commands. GAP-019 remains open for broker residual-risk acceptance or stronger host-side isolation.

gap_019_k_summary.control_type: root-capture opt-in gate plus deployment-scoped Pod migration capture path validation
gap_019_k_summary.reason: The action worker still runs as root for Pod migration capture, so non-dry-run capture now fails closed unless the operator explicitly sets ARCLINK_ACTION_WORKER_ALLOW_ROOT_MIGRATION_CAPTURE=1 for a bounded migration window. Capture source, target, and staging paths are validated as deployment-scoped ArcLink state roots before file copying starts.
gap_019_k_summary.remaining_gate: This prevents accidental or unapproved root capture work, but it does not remove the root boundary. GAP-019 remains open for a dedicated migration-capture helper or an explicit operator residual-risk decision.

gap_019_l_summary.control_type: active-agent metadata, Docker agent home, Hermes home, log key, process key, and setpriv agent-process env guard before helper requests or root process launch
gap_019_l_summary.reason: The agent supervisor still runs as root for setpriv-based process supervision, so active-agent database metadata is treated as untrusted before helper requests, numeric privilege-drop command construction, broker requests, or subprocess launch. Agent ids, Unix users, canonical Docker agent homes, Hermes homes, workspace paths, log names, process keys, and agent-process env keys now fail closed locally.
gap_019_l_summary.remaining_gate: This narrows the root supervisor command/path surface but does not remove root. GAP-019 remains open for a process-runner helper, host-run supervisor design, or explicit operator residual-risk decision.

gap_019_m_summary.remaining_gate: GAP-019 remains open until the operator either accepts the residual trusted-host Docker/root risk or replaces the remaining brokers/root helpers with stronger isolation.

gap_019_am_summary.control_type: agent-process-helper and supervisor unapproved process env rejection
gap_019_am_summary.removed_authority: removed request ability to inject dynamic loader, Python import-path, shell startup, Git/SSH command-steering, or secret-looking env keys into root-reconstructed Docker agent process launches
gap_019_am_summary.reason: agent-process-helper validates request env before log creation, subprocess.run, or subprocess.Popen. It now rejects LD_ dynamic-loader keys, Python path/startup keys, shell startup keys, Git/SSH command-steering keys, and secret-looking *_TOKEN, *_SECRET, *_PASSWORD, or *_KEY keys. agent-supervisor strips known ArcLink helper tokens and fails closed on the same unapproved non-token key family before helper payload construction.
gap_019_am_summary.remaining_gate: This narrows root process-helper env authority only. GAP-019 remains open for agent-process-helper residual root process-runner authority, other root helpers, writeable Docker socket brokers, live alert integration, stronger isolation, or operator residual-risk acceptance.

gap_019_an_summary.control_type: canonical Docker agent path validation rejects symlink-escaped agent home, Hermes home, and workspace paths
gap_019_an_summary.removed_authority: removed request ability to make root helper filesystem, log, or subprocess work follow pre-existing symlinks out of the canonical Docker agent path
gap_019_an_summary.reason: The root Docker agent helpers now compare lexical canonical child paths with resolved canonical targets. A symlink at the agent home, under .local/share/arclink-agent, or at the workspace path fails before uid/gid assignment writes, account commands, recursive chown, helper log creation, subprocess.run, or subprocess.Popen.
gap_019_an_summary.remaining_gate: This narrows root helper path authority only. GAP-019 remains open for agent-user-helper and agent-process-helper residual root authority, writeable Docker socket broker residual risk, live alert integration, stronger isolation, or operator residual-risk acceptance.

gap_019_ao_summary.control_type: canonical helper log directory validation before log open or subprocess execution
gap_019_ao_summary.removed_authority: removed request ability to redirect state/docker/agent-process-helper logs through a pre-existing symlink under the canonical private state tree
gap_019_ao_summary.reason: agent-process-helper now verifies the lexical log directory and its resolved target against the canonical state/docker/agent-process-helper path before mkdir/open, subprocess.run, or subprocess.Popen. A symlinked helper log directory fails closed and normal non-symlink log directories still work.
gap_019_ao_summary.remaining_gate: This narrows process-helper log path authority only. GAP-019 remains open for agent-process-helper residual root process-runner authority, other root helpers, writeable Docker socket brokers, live alert integration, stronger isolation, or operator residual-risk acceptance.

gap_019_ap_summary.control_type: loopback direct-run listener defaults with explicit Compose broad-bind override for internal request networks
gap_019_ap_summary.removed_authority: removed implicit 0.0.0.0 direct-run listener defaults from high-authority Docker/root brokers and helpers
gap_019_ap_summary.reason: The high-authority broker/helper modules can be run directly during local repair or diagnostics. Direct execution should not bind every interface unless the operator or Compose explicitly sets the service host; Compose still sets 0.0.0.0 for internal request-network reachability and keeps healthchecks on 127.0.0.1.
gap_019_ap_summary.remaining_gate: This narrows accidental direct-run exposure only. GAP-019 remains open for writeable Docker socket authority, root helper authority, live alert integration, stronger isolation, or operator residual-risk acceptance.

gap_019_aq_summary.removed_authority: removed os.environ.copy inheritance from agent-supervisor enrollment-provisioner child process
gap_019_aq_summary.reason: agent-supervisor still invokes the enrollment provisioner loop in Docker mode, but that child no longer needs the supervisor's full service environment. The child receives Docker mode/path config, runtime roots, service URLs, and the helper/broker values needed for Docker enrollment and queued operator actions, while unrelated payment, provider, bot, ingress, memory-synthesis, session, fleet, Python, and Git/SSH steering env keys are not forwarded.
gap_019_aq_summary.remaining_gate: This narrows one child-process secret exposure path only. agent-supervisor still has private config/state/vault mounts for Docker agent reconciliation, and GAP-019 remains open for root helper/socket broker residual risk, stronger isolation, live alert integration, or operator residual-risk acceptance.

gap_019_ar_summary.control_type: dashboard backend host IP validation before helper or broker subprocess execution
gap_019_ar_summary.removed_authority: dashboard backend host values can no longer be wildcard, global, multicast, malformed, or non-IP values before Hermes dashboard or dashboard proxy subprocesses are constructed
gap_019_ar_summary.reason: Docker-mode agent dashboards are bound behind an agent-specific internal dashboard network and a loopback-published auth proxy. The root process helper and dashboard sidecar broker now both require the dashboard backend host to be loopback or Docker-internal before starting the dashboard process or sidecar proxy.
gap_019_ar_summary.remaining_gate: This narrows one dashboard process/proxy routing boundary only. agent-process-helper remains a root helper, agent-supervisor-broker remains a writeable Docker socket broker, and GAP-019 remains open for stronger isolation, live alert integration, or operator residual-risk acceptance.

gap_019_as_summary.control_type: configured Docker agent-home root symlink rejection before root helper work
gap_019_as_summary.removed_authority: A configured ARCLINK_DOCKER_AGENT_HOME_ROOT path can no longer be a symlink or include symlink components that redirect uid/gid assignment writes, ownership repair, helper logs, or subprocess execution outside the canonical Docker agent-home root.
gap_019_as_summary.reason: The prior GAP-019-AN guard rejected symlink escapes inside an agent home, Hermes home, and workspace, but a symlinked home-root itself could still make both root helpers accept canonical-looking child paths while resolving them elsewhere. The helpers now reject symlinked configured/requested agent-home roots before filesystem mutation, helper log creation, or subprocess work.
gap_019_as_summary.remaining_gate: This narrows one configured-root path escape only. agent-user-helper and agent-process-helper remain root helpers, and GAP-019 remains open for stronger isolation, live alert integration, or operator residual-risk acceptance.

gap_019_at_summary.control_type: configured repo, private-state, state, and runtime root symlink rejection before root process-helper work
gap_019_at_summary.removed_authority: Configured or requested ARCLINK_REPO_DIR, ARCLINK_PRIV_DIR, ARCLINK_DOCKER_CONTAINER_PRIV_DIR, state_dir, and RUNTIME_DIR paths can no longer include symlink components that redirect helper logs, cwd, command paths, or subprocess execution outside the configured Docker-mode roots.
gap_019_at_summary.reason: GAP-019-AS covered the configured Docker agent-home root shared by both root agent helpers. agent-process-helper also accepts configured ArcLink repo, private-state, state, and runtime roots. Those roots now reject symlink components before helper log creation, subprocess.run, or subprocess.Popen, so a symlinked private root cannot silently place state/docker/agent-process-helper logs under an escaped target.
gap_019_at_summary.remaining_gate: This narrows one process-helper configured-root path escape only. agent-process-helper remains a root process-runner boundary, and GAP-019 remains open for stronger isolation, live alert integration, or operator residual-risk acceptance.

gap_019_ba_summary.control_type: agent-user-helper uid/gid assignment file and temporary file preflight before root work
gap_019_ba_summary.removed_authority: Pre-existing .arclink-user-ids.json or .arclink-user-ids.json.tmp paths can no longer be symlinks, directories, or non-regular files that steer root helper assignment writes outside the canonical Docker agent-home root.
gap_019_ba_summary.reason: agent-user-helper persists stable Docker agent uid/gid assignments under ARCLINK_DOCKER_AGENT_HOME_ROOT. The helper now validates the assignment JSON file and its temporary write target as canonical non-symlink regular-or-missing root children and creates the temp file with exclusive no-follow semantics before writing.
gap_019_ba_summary.remaining_gate: This narrows one root helper file-write boundary only. agent-user-helper still has residual root authority for validated Docker agent-home setup, and GAP-019 remains open for stronger isolation, live alert integration, or operator residual-risk acceptance.

gap_019_bb_summary.control_type: redacted rejected-request incident JSONL under configured private state
gap_019_bb_summary.removed_authority: Rejected agent-process-helper requests no longer disappear as transient redacted errors without a durable local incident row for root-helper boundary triage.
gap_019_bb_summary.reason: agent-process-helper now appends one structured incident to state/docker/agent-process-helper/rejections.jsonl for rejected requests when ARCLINK_PRIV_DIR and ARCLINK_DOCKER_CONTAINER_PRIV_DIR resolve to the same safe configured private root. gap_019_bc_summary.removed_authority: Rejected gateway-exec-broker requests no longer disappear as transient delivery errors without a durable local incident row for public Agent gateway broker boundary triage.
gap_019_bc_summary.reason: gateway-exec-broker now appends one structured incident to ARCLINK_STATE_ROOT_BASE/_broker-incidents/gateway-exec-broker/rejections.jsonl for rejected requests when ARCLINK_STATE_ROOT_BASE is absolute, non-root, existing, and non-symlinked. gap_019_bc_summary.remaining_gate: This adds local incident evidence only. It does not close GAP-019, prove live alerting or public bot delivery, or remove gateway-exec-broker writeable Docker socket authority.

services.purpose: Dedicated root helper for validated Docker agent install, identity refresh, user-agent refresh, cron tick, gateway, and dashboard process execution.

services.proxy_or_broker_candidate_status: GAP-019-P implemented: agent-supervisor no longer declares root, builds setpriv command arrays, or owns gateway/dashboard process handles; Docker-mode agent process execution requires the tokened agent-process-helper. GAP-019-R narrows that helper's env exposure by keeping env values out of setpriv argv/startup logs and stripping supervisor helper tokens from agent process specs. GAP-019-W adds a helper-side ArcLink control-token env denylist before subprocess execution. GAP-019-X removes the helper's broad app env inheritance and global container-secrets mount. GAP-019-AD rejects caller-controlled PATH, uses absolute /usr/bin/setpriv, and fails identity setup closed without the pinned runtime python. GAP-019-AJ restarts gateway/dashboard processes when the validated desired command, cwd, or env signature changes and uses bounded shutdown before replacement. GAP-019-AR rejects wildcard, global, multicast, malformed, or non-IP dashboard backend hosts before dashboard subprocess construction. GAP-019-AS rejects symlinked configured/requested Docker agent-home roots before helper log creation or subprocess work. GAP-019-AT rejects symlinked configured/requested repo, private-state, state, and runtime roots before helper log creation or subprocess work. GAP-019-AU preflights fixed repo command targets before helper logs or subprocess work. GAP-019-AM rejects dynamic-loader, Python path/startup, shell startup, Git/SSH command-steering, and secret-looking process env keys before subprocess execution. GAP-019-BB records redacted rejected-request incidents under configured private state for local root-helper triage.
services.residual_policy_state: Root setpriv process execution remains trusted-host authority in agent-process-helper; GAP-019 remains open pending stronger isolation or operator residual-risk acceptance.

services.purpose: Dedicated broker that executes Raven-mediated selected-Agent Hermes gateway turns for notification-delivery.
services.why_socket_needed: The broker executes the selected deployment's Hermes gateway container after validating a deployment-scoped request from notification-delivery.
services.proxy_or_broker_candidate_status: GAP-019-B2 reviewed; GAP-019-F implemented: notification-delivery no longer mounts the Docker socket; the dedicated broker owns the remaining public-Agent gateway exec socket authority. GAP-019-Y narrows the broker service env and private mounts. GAP-019-AH rejects unsafe Docker CLI executable configuration before broker subprocesses. GAP-019-AY rejects unsafe Compose fallback config files before fallback command dispatch. GAP-019-BC records redacted rejected-request incidents under the configured deployment state root.
services.residual_policy_state: Writeable Docker socket access is host-root-equivalent; GAP-019 remains open until the gateway exec broker is accepted as the residual boundary or replaced by a stronger helper/isolation design.
